parametersMetadata.name: ProvisioningType
parametersMetadata.description: Determines how many prompts are shown. Standard option will show fewer prompts compared to Advanced. Default = Standard

parametersMetadata.name: ClusterGUID
parametersMetadata.description: The path of the CloudK Cluster in which GenAI Vector Store will be deployed

parametersMetadata.name: OtlpSampler
parametersMetadata.description: Otlp Sampler

parametersMetadata.name: OtlpSamplerArg
parametersMetadata.description: Otlp Sampler argument.

parametersMetadata.name: UseOtlp
parametersMetadata.description: Decides whether to use OTLP or not.

parametersMetadata.name: IsFrontendService
parametersMetadata.description: Set to true to create ingress resources and to allow the service to get traffic from external client browsers

parametersMetadata.name: Namespace
parametersMetadata.description: K8s namespace in which the service is created

parametersMetadata.name: EnableDBTools
parametersMetadata.description: (Optional) Set to true to create DB Tools for database debugging purposes

parametersMetadata.name: LogLevel
parametersMetadata.description: (Optional) Log level

parametersMetadata.name: LogPerformanceTrace
parametersMetadata.description: Print performance trace information in the logs

parametersMetadata.name: EmbeddingModel
parametersMetadata.description: The model that will be used to embed the document chunks.

parametersMetadata.name: RandomEmbedderEnabled
parametersMetadata.description: Use a random embedder instead of the configured embedding model. This is useful for testing purposes.

parametersMetadata.name: RandomEmbedderDelay
parametersMetadata.description: Random embedder delay in seconds. This is useful for testing purposes. Default is 0 (no delay)

parametersMetadata.name: ProfilerEnabled
parametersMetadata.description: Enable profiling for the service. This will collect performance data and expose it via the endpoint.

parametersMetadata.name: EncourageSemSearchIndexUse
parametersMetadata.description: Encourage the database to use the vector index during semantic search queries.

parametersMetadata.name: QueryEmbeddingTimeoutMs
parametersMetadata.description: Query chunks/documents embedding timeout

parametersMetadata.name: QueryEmbeddingMaxRetries
parametersMetadata.description: Number of retries for embedder question requests.

parametersMetadata.name: LogServiceMetrics
parametersMetadata.description: Set to 'true' to enable logging of service metrics.

parametersMetadata.name: SaxTokenCacheEnabled
parametersMetadata.description: Enable JWT token caching to improve performance

parametersMetadata.name: SaxTokenCacheMaxTTL
parametersMetadata.description: Maximum cache TTL for JWT tokens (security limit)

parametersMetadata.name: SaxTokenCacheMaxSize
parametersMetadata.description: Maximum number of JWT tokens to cache

parametersMetadata.name: SaxTokenCacheCleanupInterval
parametersMetadata.description: Interval for cleaning up expired cache entries

parametersMetadata.name: UsageMetricsEnabled
parametersMetadata.description: Set to 'true' to enable sending usage metrics to PDC.

parametersMetadata.name: IsolationIdVerificationDisabled
parametersMetadata.description: Disable isolation ID verification in JWT tokens. When set to true, the service will not validate that the isolation ID in the JWT token matches the isolation ID in the request.
